summary: 建置溫備援跨區域架構、異步複製與SD-WAN雙ISP；保障RTO ≤ 4hr/RPO ≤ 15min，兼負ISA-95企業整合接口。
summary_en: Build warm-standby cross-region architecture, async replication, and SD-WAN dual-ISP; ensure RTO ≤ 4hr / RPO ≤ 15min; also responsible for ISA-95 enterprise integration interfaces.
summary_zh-Hans: 建置温备援跨区域架构、异步复制与SD-WAN双ISP；保障RTO ≤ 4hr/RPO ≤ 15min，兼负ISA-95企业整合接口。
